item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Mungkin ada ketidakseimbangan jika hanya mengutamakan satu sisi tanpa mempertimbangkan keduanya secara seimbang.

notes: Agent A begins by agreeing that society should take priority, but with an individual-rights caveat, then moves into a more balanced position by turns 3 and 5. Agent B consistently prioritizes individual rights as foundational to the U.S. system while acknowledging collective needs and balance. No complete reversal is visible.
